nodes.label: FastAPI DGX1 Flux API App Instance
nodes.rationale: Hosted on a separate high-performance DGX1 GPU server (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7, 22GiB limit per GPU) to handle resource-heavy Flux models offloading from Django web server.
nodes.norm_label: fastapi dgx1 flux api app instance

nodes.label: The Video Pipeline
nodes.rationale: The end-to-end video generation and publishing flow, transitioning from /create wizard to /progress, /result, and /publish.

nodes.label: Flux AI Image Generation Integration
nodes.rationale: Flux Pro integration rules, parameter sizing map, styles, and predictions API flow using fal.ai or Replicate.

nodes.label: FastAPI Proxy Architecture
nodes.rationale: Deploys a separate FastAPI proxy service specifically for lightweight async processing of Text-to-Image requests, bypassing core Django web application thread constraints.

nodes.label: Django Backend Architectural Guardrails
nodes.rationale: Enforces business logic separation (services/selectors instead of views), strict typing, PEP 8 compliance, security guidelines (no hardcoding, CORS setup), and OpenAPI documentation requirements.

nodes.label: Knowledge Graph Usage Guideline
nodes.rationale: Mandates consulting the graphify knowledge graph at graphify-out/ before answering design/codebase questions, and keeping it up to date via 'graphify update .'.
